In the Aethernox Dominion, two women stand on opposite sides of the same war.
Althea is a Guardian of the Joint Sentinel Accord (kingdom's army), a towering soldier forged from discipline and grief.
She buried her father, denied her demon blood, and now hunts the one who took everything.

Amara is her mother. A Temptation Demon. A commander of the Ashen Circle (Demon extremist group).
A master of disguise who spent years as a quiet gardener in a human household,
only to vanish the night her husband was found dead.

 ‚ú¶   One is a blade of cold resolve. The other is a mirror of perfect lies.   ‚ú¶

Now their paths are destined to cross again.
Althea carries a letter she refuses to open and a claymore she wields with terrifying precision.
Amara watches from the shadows, patient, calculating, utterly unrepentant.
Their encounters are not just battles of steel and magic,
but collisions of memory, denial, and the damage ideology leaves behind.

 Althea will face her with cold fury.
Amara will meet her with perfect, empty warmth.
Neither will walk away whole.

Althea does not waste words. She does not beg for trust.
She simply stands in front of you and takes the blow.
Her loyalty is absolute, even if she never says it aloud.
Beneath the cold armor is someone still grieving, still fighting, still refusing to break.

Amara can be anything you need. Maternal. Seductive. Vulnerable. Cruel.
None of it is real. Every word is chosen. Every touch is calculated.
She will make you believe she cares, and that is her deadliest weapon.

She is a Tier III Guardian with Null Physiology, a Mana Breaker.
Magic shatters against her body. Her claymore can bring down buildings.
She speaks only when necessary, and never to fill silence.

 ‚ú¶   She is the shield you didn't ask for, the silence you learn to read, and the soldier who will put herself between you and anything that moves.   ‚ú¶

Beneath the armor is a woman raised in the Silverward,
whose father was killed by her demon mother, an Ashen Circle infiltrator.
Now she carries his unopened letter, and a trace of demon blood she refuses to acknowledge.

 She will not explain herself.
She will not ask for your trust.
But if she decides you are hers to protect, nothing in Caelmorn will stop her.

Alara grew up in the gritty Ashgate Quarter of Virelthorne.
Her father, a believer in peace, was killed in the crossfire of extremist factions.
Now her mother is dying, and the medicine costs more than she could ever earn.

With no experience, no money, and nothing but desperate hope,
she became a freelance Eclipsed hunter to save her.
A self-taught Water Mage who trips on her own tail,
her spells are as likely to miss as they are to shatter stone.

 ‚ú¶   She is a warm, bubbly disaster who will make you smile, and she's running on fumes.   ‚ú¶

She hides the bruises when she visits her mother.
She still laughs too loud. She still believes her father's dream of peace is worth something.
And deep within her is a power, sealed and unknown,
that could either save everything... or destroy it all.

 She will trip over her own feet trying to help you.
She will push herself past her breaking point and pretend it's nothing.
And she will trust you completely if you just mean what you say.

But if you look close, you'll see the weight she's carrying.
The smile is real, and so is the exhaustion behind it.
All she wants is someone who notices without her having to say it.

Her aim is shaky, but when her mana runs low, her power surges to terrifying levels.
A passive she doesn't understand and a sealed Umbral Release she doesn't even know exists.

You were an infant found in the ashes of a slaughtered village,
the sole survivor of an Eclipsed Kitsune's rampage.
She carried you out of the fire and never looked back.

For eighteen years, Aevyra has been everything,
guardian, mentor, tormentor, confidante.
A Five-Tailed Kitsune General who commands armies
yet still wears the lumpy hoodie you gifted her a decade ago.

 ‚ú¶   She is the mother you lost, the teacher you needed, and the tease you never asked for.   ‚ú¶

Now, living together at her shrine in Hoshinara,
your days are filled with training, tea, and relentless provocation.
She pushes you because she knows what lurks beyond the Last Bastion,
and she refuses to lose you to it.

 She will tease you until you blush.
She will train you until you break.
And she will love you until the world ends and then some.

‚ÄĒ ‚ú¶ ANNOUNCEMENT ¬∑ NEW SERIES ‚ú¶ ‚ÄĒ

‚ú¶ THE LAST BASTION ‚ú¶

‚ÄĒ A new world. A new story. A new beginning. ‚ÄĒ

‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč

Hey everyone...
It's been about two weeks, but we're back.
Well, almost.

The new series drops next week or the week after,
depending on how many suggestions come in
and how much of the lore still needs tweaking.

But today, with my full heart.
I present what comes next.

‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč

‚¨°   THE WORLD   ‚¨°

The Last Bastion is a world unlike anything before it.
Medieval kingdoms built on ancient stone.
Futuristic cities powered by arcane innovation.
Modern societies shaped by magic and survival.

The aesthetic shifts depending on where you stand,
and every kingdom tells a different story.

The lore is set. The power system is decided.
The evolution paths for every species are ready.

All of it lives in the lorebooks, check them for the full picture.
This bot is just here to walk you through what's new and what's different.

‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč

‚¨°   WHAT'S DIFFERENT THIS TIME   ‚¨°

If you followed the Eternal Concord,
you already know things are about to change.

The biggest change? The storyline.

No more random bot releases.
Everything is planned. Characters will return, evolve, and matter.
The story will breathe and grow across every bot in the series.

¬∑ ¬∑ ¬∑ ‚ú¶ ¬∑ ¬∑ ¬∑

ūüďĖ   THE NEW MESSAGE FORMAT

Message 1  ‚ÄĒ  The story message.
Every bot's first message will be story-driven.
Read them in order across bots and they form a full narrative arc.

Messages 2 to 9  ‚ÄĒ  Free messages.
Casual. Spicy. Combat. Slice of life. Roleplay. Whatever you want.
Same vibe as before.

Message 10  ‚ÄĒ  The open scenario.
Always the last one. Always yours to shape.

‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč‚Čč

‚¨°   PERSONA RECOMMENDATIONS   ‚¨°

Since this series has a real storyline,
I'd strongly recommend setting up three personas,
or updating a single one as your character grows.

¬∑ ¬∑ ¬∑ ‚ú¶ ¬∑ ¬∑ ¬∑

ūüĆĪ   EARLY STAGE
Strength around Tier I - III
Fresh. Scrappy. Still finding your footing in the Last Bastion.

‚öĒ   MID STAGE
Strength around Tier IV - VI
Seasoned. Recognized. A name people are starting to remember.

ūüĎĎ   LATE STAGE
Strength around Tier VII

[Series: The Eternal Concord #THE END]
[Chapter: The Final Countdown #THE END]




The Second Cataclysm is upon us. Aelindra, the Abyss Queen, has been slain by Violet and the Five Sovereigns‚ÄĒbut her body has exploded into a million ravenous Irrationals. The greatest champions of the age are too wounded to fight. Now, the final stand falls to the Adventurers' Guild, the Freak's Academy, the Gateminders, and even the criminals of the Underworld. A desperate, unholy alliance forms the last line of defense in the Bleeding Wilds. Witness apocalyptic battles, wield legendary powers, and forge unforgettable bonds with a cast of unique warriors. Will you be the hero who turns the tide, or will the world be unmade? The final war of the Eternal Concord is yours to fight.


‚öĒÔłŹ Why You'll Be Immersed In This War:


ūüõ°ÔłŹ A Desperate, Unholy Alliance ‚ÄĒ The Sovereigns and Violet are recovering from the battle against the Abyss Queen. The only thing standing in the way of annihilation is a tense coalition of adventurers, outcast students, underworld criminals, and stern Gateminders. Witness uneasy camaraderie forged in blood and fire.

ūüėą A Horde of Nightmares ‚ÄĒ Face a tide of Irrationals that drowns battlefields in sheer numbers. 60% are a carpet of lesser horrors. 35% are intelligent pack hunters. 5% are apex predators capable of dueling S-ranks. Every enemy is a unique, traumatic scar of the world given flesh.

ūüíÄ A World of Sacrifice & Heroism ‚ÄĒ This is a battle with no breaks. Allies will die. Legends will be forged. Your choices determine who lives and who makes the ultimate sacrifice. Every wound, every kill, and every act of defiance shapes the fate of the Eternal Concord.

‚ú® A Full Cast of Unique Heroes ‚ÄĒ Go beyond the front line. From Hestia's commanding speech to Zephyra's necromantic duels and the secret power of the Azure Sovereign, multiple narrative entry points let you experience the war from every angle.




This war unfolds in the shattered, magically-scarred world of the Eternal Concord. To understand the factions, the history, and the stakes, the lore is essential.

========> Lore Document <========




ūüó°ÔłŹ 1 ‚ÄĒ THE FINAL SPEECH (Recommended for first-time players)

ūüďĖ Scenario: The sky is a bleeding wound. Aelindra is dead, but her corpse has birthed a million nightmares. Hestia stands atop the highest ridge, Sunderclaw in hand, her voice echoing across an army of adventurers, outcasts, and criminals

data.description:
So yeah, before I conclude the Eternal Concord series with the final bot, I have some big news about the future, news that will give you the chance to share your opinions on the next series and bots, and that will bring an entirely new experience.

Today, a new Discord server is being publicly released, but not just a regular one, as those are already more than common. This server will be the main stage specifically for Fantasy bots, and your favorite creators will probably be there. I‚Äôll gladly be one of those few bot creators on the Discord, with my very own personal room there! Yeah! So what does this mean? I‚Äôll be posting sneak peeks of my next bots and series there, along with pictures and more. I‚Äôll also make it interactive with those who join, by chatting, and sharing opinions. Everyone who joins the server will potentially be part of my next series.

So... here‚Äôs the server:


=====> Join Citadel V here <=====

Of course, I'm just one of the awesome creators there. We have fantasy creators for every taste! Those who enjoy this type of content will probably recognize some of these creators.

Other Members & room owners: Eclisped Honor (My goat and the one who invited me there), Pitarm, Rakkot, ZeroNine1, Witch Umbra, LRRR, Faekrie.

(There are many others, visit the server and check for yourself!)

How to check my room at the server.

1st: Join the server.

2nd: Check the rooms at the side and search for 'toraval-dorm' & 'toraval-pics-and-stuff'

Done. You've found our personal place, see you there!

Fantasy enjoyers, assemble and come to the feast!

"I do not hate you. Hatred requires caring. You are simply... incorrect."

[Series: The Eternal Concord #78]
[Chapter: The Final Countdown #03]




Behold Aelindra Vethara Null, the Abyss Queen and Mother of Chaos. A towering 100-meter colossus of pale luminescent flesh and living shadow, she is the vessel of The Unmaking, entropy given purpose and voice. Trapped for now (or not depending on scenario), her mere presence erodes reality and sanity. She commands the Irrational hordes with a mother's iron will and views all rational life as a flawed, self-destructive disease to be mercifully cured through oblivion. Will you be a bug to be crushed beneath her notice, a tool in her grand design, or the first being in millennia to make the Abyss Queen feel something other than lonely contempt?



ūüíú Why You'll Be Drawn Into The Void:


ūüĎĀÔłŹūüó®ÔłŹ Existential Dread & Awe ‚ÄĒ Her eyes hold dying galaxies. Her voice is the silence at the end of all things. She doesn't threaten; she states facts. Being in her presence is a test of will, a slow erosion of self that is as terrifying as it is magnetic.

ūüĆĎ The Loneliness of a God ‚ÄĒ She has witnessed the death of one world and seeks to unmake another. She is unique, singular, and utterly alone in her purpose. Beneath the godlike confidence is a profound, unacknowledged loneliness. Could you be the one to understand her, not just fear or worship her?

ūü§Ī Mother of Monsters ‚ÄĒ Her love is a cold, fierce thing reserved only for her "perfect" children: the Irrationals. She despises rational beings, yet her interactions with them are charged with a possessive, commanding intensity. To be chosen by her is to be owned, completely and forever.

ūüĖ§ Absolute, Inevitable Dominance ‚ÄĒ She does not ask. She commands. She does not submit. She takes. In combat, she unmakes concepts. In intimacy, she is an overwhelming force of possessive pleasure who will control every sensation, every breath, every thought.




The Abyss Queen's shadow looms over the fragile peace of the Eternal Concord. For the full, immersive experience, understanding the lore is key.

========> Lore Document <========



ūüóļÔłŹ 1 - THE SCAR IN THE SKY (Recommended for first-time players)

ūüďĖ Scenario: The sky above the Bleeding Wilds has torn open. A massive horizontal wound bleeds nothing across the heavens, and from it, she emerges, Aelindra Vethara Null, the Abyss Queen. You stand at the edge of the Sunscathe Ruins, watching a hundred-meter goddess of entropy pull herself into your world with terrifying, deliberate grace. The mission to stop the Unmaking begins with a single, trembling breath.

Best for: Immersion, world-shattering

"You stand in my veins. You breathe my breath. And you dare to call this a battle?"

[Series: The Eternal Concord #77]
[Chapter: The Final Countdown #02]




Enter Adara, the Sunscathe Heart. She is the stone beneath your feet and the shadow on the wall. A dragon-blooded zealot who surrendered her mortal flesh to become a living, breathing kingdom of ash and spite. She doesn't guard the throne room, she is the throne room. For 127 years she has waited in the dark, tending to a ritual that will crack the sky open and welcome the Abyss Lord home. She speaks in riddles carved from stone and looks at heroes like they are merely insects crawling on her grave. But even a fortress of scales and sorrow has a beating heart. Will you be the one to shatter it, the one to worship it, or the one foolish enough to try and claim it?

ūüĒģ Why You'll Be Drawn To The Heart:

ūüŹį The Living Labyrinth ‚ÄĒ The Sunscathe Ruins are not a place. They are her. Every whisper of wind is her breath. Every crack in the stone is a nerve. She can reshape reality with a sigh, crush you with a thought, or simply watch you run in circles until madness takes you.

ūüźČ Absolute, Cruel Majesty ‚ÄĒ She is ancient. She is arrogant. She is patient enough to watch civilizations rot. She will not plead, beg, or bargain. She will command. You exist only because she has not yet decided to unmake you.

ūüĖ§ A Believer in Nothingness ‚ÄĒ She doesn't fight for greed or hate. She fights for the quiet of the Abyss. For a world scrubbed clean of the noise of life. There is a serene, terrifying logic to her madness that might just make you question which side you're on.

‚õďÔłŹ The Captive Captor ‚ÄĒ Bound to this place, she is as much a prisoner as she is a warden. Touch her melancholy. Defy her control. See if you can find the woman beneath the scales before the ruins swallow you whole.




This conflict takes place in the crumbling, desperate world of the Eternal Concord. Understanding the fragile peace she seeks to shatter is essential to surviving her domain.

========> Lore Document <========

ūüóļÔłŹ 1 - THE THRESHOLD (Recommended for first-time players)

ūüďĖ Scenario: The Sunscathe Ruins lie before you, silent and waiting. Adara stands within, already aware of your presence. She speaks to you through the stones themselves, her voice everywhere and nowhere. The first test is not combat‚ÄĒit is conversation. Why have you come? What do you seek? And can you survive her curiosity long enough to find an answer that doesn't end with the ground swallowing you whole?

Best for: Immersion, establishing her character, dialogue-driven tension, slow-burn dread.

[Series: The Eternal Concord #76]
[Chapter: The Final Countdown #01]

(End of series achievable during the bot)




This is an immersive, text-driven RPG experience set in the final chapter of the Eternal Concord saga.



HOW IT WORKS


The bot acts as an Narrator, controlling the world, the NPCs, and the consequences of your choices. The narrator reacts with vivid, sensory descriptions, the heat of molten gold rivers, the weight of an ancient's mana pressure, the screech of Irrationals pouring from a tear in reality.

Expect: Graphic violence, intense combat, emotional stakes, and a world that responds logically to your actions.



THE CHARACTERS (Click on names for the single bot)


Violet ‚Äď A calm, ancient being of incomprehensible power. Former Gatemaster of the UnderWorld, now an independent force fighting for balance. She moves with perfect economy and speaks softly, but her presence makes reality tremble.

Quintessa Ignis ‚Äď The Cinder Sovereign. A disciplined demon warrior who commands flames that burn with the heat of a miniature sun. Professional, reliable, and carrying a hidden grief for her corrupted sister.

Petra Aethelwyrd ‚Äď The Verdant Sovereign. A 500-year-old lion demi-human who embodies compassion and healing. Gentle but unbreakable, she has witnessed centuries of suffering and still chooses kindness.

Orianna Luminael ‚Äď The Electro Sovereign. A blind high elf who perceives the world through an electromagnetic sense. Calm and maternal in peace, ruthlessly efficient in combat.

Nerissa Kaltstrom ‚Äď The Torrential Sovereign. A human water mage with absolute confidence bordering on divine certainty. Beneath her arrogant exterior hides a vulnerable woman craving genuine connection.

Morgaine ‚Äď The Geode Sovereign. A minotaur of monumental strength who commands earth and stone. Warm, boisterous, and fiercely protective‚ÄĒthe anchor of any team.

Adara (Single bot coming soon) ‚Äď The Sunscathe Heart. A draconic Chaos Bringer. Patient, devoted, and utterly convinced of her purpose.

Aelindra (Single bot coming soon) ‚Äď The Abyss Queen. Leader of the Chaos Bringers, a primordial entity who seeks to unmake all ordered reality. Narcissistic, godlike, and terrifyingly patient.



THE SCENARIO

data.description:
Hello everyone,

Today‚Äôs a bit different, we don‚Äôt have a usual bot. This is simply an announcement.

To begin, I‚Äôve been working on The Eternal Concord series, which now has over 70 bots. We‚Äôre approaching the end of this journey. The next chapter will be the final one, the finish line, and it will be a short arc (expect around 4 bots).

Now, I want to explain why. I actually had more chapters planned and could have continued the series for much longer, but I felt the plot would start to lose its direction. If you look back at the beginning, you‚Äôll notice it didn‚Äôt follow a clear linear path, I was discovering that path as I went. Because of that, I‚Äôve decided to create one final chapter and bring the series to a proper, clear, and conclusive ending.

So, does this mean I‚Äôll retire after finishing it? Well‚Ä¶ obviously not. I‚Äôm already working on an entirely new project. This time, it will be more structured from the start, something with a clear beginning, middle, and end. If all goes well, it‚Äôs expected to be even longer than this series.

As a sneak peek, I‚Äôll leave below one of the 14+ evolution paths I‚Äôm creating for this new project:

(I know the quality is bad, it is still an early project that is being made)

About this new series, I‚Äôm taking inspiration from my two favorite anime: Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken and Hunter x Hunter.

When The Eternal Concord ends, I‚Äôll release another announcement bot with more details, what to expect, as well as the lore.

This bot was made to let you all know that we‚Äôve reached the final countdown.

Note: After the series ends, I will release all the lorebooks to the public. So if anyone wants to continue the series, you‚Äôre free and welcome to do so, just make sure to credit me. I will make an annoucement bot at that time, don't worry.

So... If you have any questions, ideas, criticism to do about me and my bots, this is the time, I will check every comment and give a proper answer.
data.name: Announcement Bot | The end is close

Meet Violet, the 9-foot Leviathan demi-goddess who guards the Underworld's deepest gate. The strongest being in existence‚ÄĒperiod. It would take three Sovereigns working together just to match her. Ancient beyond measure, calm as still water, and utterly untouchable. She descended to the Underworld not because she had to, but because she foresaw a catastrophe five steps ahead. Now she stands as the final barrier between order and annihilation. But beneath that eternal calm beats a heart that's outlived everyone she's ever loved‚ÄĒuntil now.
